heading: Report on United States citizens detained by Iran
label: 9409 Report on United States citizens detained by Iran
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section to the Secretary of State, see section 1(a) of Memorandum of President of the United States, , 82 F.R. 50051, set out in a note under .Oct. 11, 2017section 9403 of this title

children.text: information regarding any officials of the Government of Iran involved in any way in the detentions; and
a summary of efforts the United States Government has taken to secure the swift release of those United States citizens.

children.heading: Form of report
children.label: b Form of report
children.text: The report required by subsection (a) shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees and leadership defined
children.label: c Appropriate congressional committees and leadership defined

children.text: the Committee on Finance, the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, the Committee on Foreign Relations, and the majority and minority leaders of the Senate; and
the Committee on Ways and Means, the Committee on Financial Services, the Committee on Foreign Affairs, and the Speaker, the majority leader, and the minority leader of the House of Representatives.
